calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Approving Balance Of Statutory Compensation To The Executor And Balance Of Statutory Compensation To Executor'S Attorneys And Request For Extraordinary Compensation To Executor'S Attorneys And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Virginia Palmer for Pedro Toledo.

Ms. Palmer stated that it was her understanding from the Probate Examiner that the fees would be reduced to $18,974.67 and explained the extent of extraordinary/fiduciary services provided to support the request. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

Petition For Order Approving Balance Of Statutory Compensation To The Executor And Balance Of Statutory Compensation To Executor'S Attorneys And Request For Extraordinary Compensation To Executor'S Attorneys And Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-01-2011 Continued To Aug-22-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-24-2011 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jan-10-2011 Continued To Jan-24-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-06-2009 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Takaaki Hirakawa (Friend/Interested Party).

Mr. Hirakawa presented his opposition/concerns to the Court. The Court asked Mr. Hirakawa if he was an heir or if he was named in the will; Mr. Hirakawa stated that he was not. The Court informed Mr. Hirakawa that he had no standing or right to raise any issues only the beneficiaries or the heirs would have the right.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy Aguerre.
